title: The Madwoman of Toujane
overview: This rambling political melodrama tells the story of a French Breton who learns about colonialism while teaching native students in France's colonies of Tunisia and Algeria and returns to his native Brittany to see that the same conditions prevail there.

trailers.title: La Folle de Toujane (1974)
trailers.channel_name: Cinémutins par Les Mutins de Pangée
